video_job.actor_prompt: Cinematic shot in a warm, wood-paneled Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall. Ari Dawncrest, a mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags and neat gloves, holds a sealed quest parcel with both hands, extending it towards Ari Silverbrook, a guild coordinator in a formal cloak. The camera is steady, capturing the focused expressions and the start of the handoff. No text, no watermarks, warm anime lighting.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Continuing the same cinematic shot in the guild hall. Ari Silverbrook, the guild coordinator, carefully accepts the sealed quest parcel from Ari Dawncrest. Both characters perform a slight, respectful bow to each other to complete the handoff. The background remains a lively, warm-lit RPG guild. Consistent character appearances, no text, no watermarks, high-quality anime art style.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is a professional, non-sexual quest item handoff between two fantasy characters, adhering to safety guidelines regarding appropriate social behavior.

timeline_story.story_verb: completed a visible quest handoff with
timeline_story.selection_reason: Ari Dawncrest hands over the recovered artifact to the coordinator for official inspection.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Successful artifact handoff and professional collaboration.
Reliable mission completion and contribution to guild goals.
